Configuration saved successfully. Note:: Vigyapan safaltapoorvak bachaaya gayaa. Dhyaan Dijiye: Cron seva chal rahee nahin hai - 'npm run cron:start' ke saath ise shuru karein taaki anusaarit kaaryon ko saksham karein.

Unable to load backup data. The database: Backup data load karne mein asamarth. Database aarthik roop se upalabdh nahin ho sakta. Kripya baad mein phir se koshish karein ya apne prabandhak se sampark karein.
Account bandh hai. Kripaya baad mein phir se koshish karein.

Binary database file - fastest backup, p: Binary database file - sabse tez backup, sabhi database structure ko preserve karta hai
SQL text file - human-readable, can be e: SQL text file - human-readable, restore se pehle edit kiya ja sakta hai
Poore database ka backup banayein. Backup aapke computer par download ho jayega.
Select a .db or .sql backup file to rest: Restore karne ke liye .db ya .sql backup file select karein. Isse current database replace ho jayega.
This will replace the current database w:
Isse current database backup file se replace ho jayega. Agar aapke paas backup nahi hai to saara current data kho jayega. Restore hone se pehle current database ki ek safety backup automatically ban jayegi.

Is action ko undo nahi kiya ja sakta.
Warning: Restoring will replace all curr: Warning: Restore karna saare current database data ko replace kar dega. Ek safety backup automatically ban jayegi.
Select how long backup records are kept: Chunein ki database mein backup records kitni der tak rakhe jayenge.
This will permanently delete all backup: Isse selected cleanup period se purane saare backup records permanently delete ho jayenge. Is action ko undo nahi kiya ja sakta.
This will remove all backup records olde: Isse selected cleanup period se purane saare backup records remove ho jayenge. Manual action zaroori hai - aapko cleanup karne ke liye button click karna hoga.
Select backup job to delete: Delete karne ke liye backup job chunein
Select a backup job to delete all its ba: Uske saare backup records permanently delete karne ke liye ek backup job chunein.
This will permanently delete all backup: Isse server "{{serverName}}" se "{{backupName}}" ke liye saare backup records permanently delete ho jayenge. Is action ko undo nahi kiya ja sakta.
Select server to delete: Delete karne ke liye server chunein
Select a server to delete all its backup: Uske saare backup data permanently delete karne ke liye ek server chunein.
This will permanently delete server \"{{: Isse server "{{serverName}}" aur uske saare backup records permanently delete ho jayenge. Is action ko undo nahi kiya ja sakta.
Select server groups to merge. These ser: Merge karne ke liye server groups chunein. In servers ka naam same hai lekin IDs alag hain.
Duplicati's machine-id can be changed af:
Upgrade ya reinstall ke baad Duplicati ka machine-id badal sakta hai.
Saare backup logs aur configurations target servers mein transfer ho jayenge.
This will merge {{count}} server group(s: Isse {{count}} server group(s) merge ho jayenge. Har group ke liye, saare purane server IDs target server (creation date ke hisaab se sabse naya) mein merge ho jayenge. Saare backup records aur configurations target servers mein transfer ho jayenge. Purane server entries delete ho jayenge. Is action ko undo nahi kiya ja sakta.
No duplicate servers found. All servers: Koi duplicate servers nahi mile. Saare servers ke naam unique hain.
Customize how duplistatus displays your: Customize karein ki duplistatus aapka data kaise dikhata hai aur visual appearance ko control karta hai
Recipient email format may be invalid (m: Praaptak email format galat ho sakta hai ( '@' chinh ko shamil karna hoga). Vibhinnatayein kisi bhi tarah se bacha li jayengi.
From address format may be invalid (must: Se address format galat ho sakta hai ( '@' chinh ko shamil karna hoga). Vibhinnatayein kisi bhi tarah se bacha li jayengi.
Recipient email must contain '@' symbol: Praaptak email mein '@' chinh hona chahiye
From address is required when authentica: Se address jaruri hai jab pramanikaran nishkriya hai aur ismein '@' chinh hona chahiye
From address must contain '@' symbol: Se address mein '@' chinh hona chahiye
Settings saved and test email sent succe: Samanvay bachaye gaye aur parikshan email bhi safaltaapoorvak bheja gaya! Aapke inbox ko janchen.
SMTP settings have been deleted successf: SMTP settings safaltapoorvak delete kar di gayi hain.
Failed to save current configuration. Yo: Vartaman configuration save karne mein asamarth. Password badalte samay aapke badlav kho sakte hain.

Email password deleted successfully: Email password safaltapoorvak delete kar diya gaya hai
Configure SMTP settings for email notifi: Email notifications ke liye SMTP settings configure karein. Settings database mein surakshit roop se store ki jaati hain.
Complete the required fields below to en: Notifications enable karne ke liye neeche diye gaye anivarya fields ko poora karein.
Always test your settings to ensure emai: Email safaltapoorvak deliver ho rahe hain, yeh sunishchit karne ke liye hamesha apni settings test karein.
SMTP Server requires authentication: SMTP Server ko authentication ki avashyakta hai
Plain SMTP connection without encryption: Encryption ke bina Plain SMTP connection (sifarish nahi ki jaati, keval vishvasniya networks ke liye istemal karein).
STARTTLS connection (recommended for por: STARTTLS connection (port 587 ke liye sifarish ki jaati hai). Connection shuruaati handshake ke baad TLS mein upgrade ho jayega.
Direct SSL/TLS connection (recommended f: Direct SSL/TLS connection (port 465 ke liye sifarish ki jaati hai). Connection shuru se hi encrypted hota hai.
Display name shown as the sender. Defaul: Sender ke roop mein dikhaya jaane wala display naam. Agar set na ho to "duplistatus" default hota hai.
Email address shown as the sender. Requi: Sender ke roop mein dikhaya jaane wala email address. Jab authentication disable ho to anivarya.
Email address shown as the sender. Defau: Sender ke roop mein dikhaya jaane wala email address. Agar set na ho to SMTP Server Username default hota hai. Note: Kuch email providers (jaise Gmail) hamesha is value ke bajaye SMTP Server Username ka istemal karenge.
Are you sure you want to delete the SMTP: Kya aap sachmuch SMTP settings delete karna chahte hain? Yeh action wapas nahi liya ja sakta aur sabhi email notification settings ko hata dega.
Alias of the server (server_name if not: Server ka alias (agar set na ho to server_name)
Size of uploaded data: Uplod kiye gaye data ka aakar

Time elapsed since the expected backup d: Ummid ki gayi backup tithi se beetaya samay

Language for default notification templa: Default notification templeton ki bhasha. Isse badalne se pehle se customize kiye gaye templeton par koi asar nahin padega. Yadi aap bhasha badal rahe hain, to naye bhasha ke defaults load karne ke liye aapko reset buttons ka upyog karna hoga.

Test notification sent successfully! Che: Test notification safalatar se bheja gaya! Apne device par jaanch karein.
Configure NTFY push notification setting: NTFY push notification settings configure karein
Learn more about NTFY at: NTFY ke bare mein adhik jaanein
to subscribe to your topic in your phone: apne phone mein apne topic ko subscribe karne ke liye.
The URL of your NTFY server. Defaults to: Aapke NTFY server ka URL. Default
Leave empty to automatically generate a: Khali chhodne par jab aap save karenge to ek random naam automatically generate kiya jayega. Aap is topic ko yahan dekh sakte hain
Enter your NTFY access token: Aapka NTFY access token darj karein
If your NTFY server requires authenticat: Yadi aapka NTFY server authentication ki avashyakta hai, to kripya apna access token darj karein. Adhik vistrit jaankari ke liye,
Please enter a server URL to test: Test karne ke liye kripya ek server URL darj karein
Please enter a valid URL: Kripya ek valid URL darj karein
Server connection test passed: Server connection test pass ho gaya
No URLs to Test: Test Karne Ke Liye Koee URLs Nahin
No server URLs are configured to test: Koee server URLs test karne ke liye configure nahin kiye gaye hain
Tested {{count}} connections: {{success}: Test kiye gaye {{count}} connections: {{success}} safal, {{failed}} asafal
Failed to test all connections: Sabhi connections ko test karne mein asafalta
Please fix invalid URLs before saving: Save karne se pehle invalid URLs ko theek karein
Server details updated successfully: Server details safalatar se update kiye gaye
Failed to save server details: Server details ko save karne mein asafalta
Failed to initialize password change: Password badalne ki prakriya ko initialize karne mein asafalta
Password updated successfully: Password safalatar se update kiya gaya
Password deleted successfully: Password safalatar se delete kiya gaya
Ab tak koee servers register nahin kiye gaye hain.
Configure an optional alias or name for: Pratyek server ke liye ek vaikalpik upnaam ya naam konfigure karein. Aap ek varnanatmak note bhi jod sakte hain. Agla, pratyek server ke liye web interface address pradaan karein aur connection ko test karein taaki yeh sulabh ho.
Server naam, upnaam, ya note dwara filter karein...
Click to change password: Password badalne ke liye click karein
Notes about this server: Is server ke bare mein notes
Change Password to Access Duplicati Serv: Duplicati Server tak pahunchane ke liye password badlein
New servers detected and added to the li: Naye serveron ka pata lagaya gaya aur soochi mein joda gaya
Note: Settings are read-only. Some featu: Note: Setting padhne ke liye hi uplabdh hain. Kuch visheshataayein jaise ki parikshan suchnaayein uplabdh rahti hain.
Failed to load users: Upyogkartaon ko load karne mein asafal
Password is required when not auto-gener: Password aavashyak hai jab auto-utpaadan nahin ho raha hai
Failed to update user: Upyogkarta ko adyatanit karne mein asafal
Manage application users and permissions: Application upyogkartaon aur anumatiyon ka prabandhan karein
Cannot delete the last admin account: Antim admin account ko delete nahi kiya ja sakta
Delete admin user (warning: this is an a: Admin upyogkarta ko delete karein (chetaavni: yeh ek admin account hai)
Create a new user account. You can auto-: Naya upyogkarta account banayein. Aap surakshit password auto-generate kar sakte hain ya custom set kar sakte hain.
Require password change on first login: Pehle login par password badalne ki aavashyakta hai
Are you sure you want to delete user {{u: Kya aap {{username}} upyogkarta ko delete karna chahte hain? Yeh kriya wapas nahi ki ja sakti.
Chetaavni: Yeh ek admin upyogkarta hai.
A new temporary password has been genera: Naya aarthik password {{username}} ke liye banaya gaya hai.
Naya aarthik password upyogkarta ke liye banaya gaya hai.
Copy this password now - it will not be: Is password ko abhi copy karein - yeh phir se nahi dikhaaya jayega!
The user will be required to change this: Upyogkarta ko yeh password badalna hoga pehle login par.
Click to view available versions: Upalabdh sanskaran dekhne ke liye click karein
Collected from {{successfulCollections}}: {{successfulCollections}} servers se sangraha kiya gaya. Prabandhit: {{totalProcessed}}, Chhoda gaya: {{totalSkipped}}, Trutiyan: {{totalErrors}}
Successfully collected from {{successful: {{successfulCollections}}/{{totalServers}} servers se safaltaapoorvak sangraha kiya gaya. Prabandhit: {{totalProcessed}}, Chhoda gaya: {{totalSkipped}}, Trutiyan: {{totalErrors}}. Asafal servers: {{failedServerNames}}
Failed to collect from all {{totalServer: Sabhi {{totalServers}} serveron se ikattha karne mein asafal: {{failedServerNames}}. Vyanaktigat server sanrachnaon ki jaanch karein.
No servers with passwords and valid URLs: Password aur vaidh URL wale koi server nahin mile jo ikattha karne ke liye paye jaayein
Check server(s) settings and password an: Server(s) sanrachna, password aur server chal raha hai ya nahin, iski jaanch karein aur phir se koshish karein. Sabhi ikattha karne ke liye click karein jo server mein truti hai
An unexpected error occurred during coll: Ikattha karne ke dauran anapextit truti aayi
No servers with passwords configured: Koi password sanrachit server nahin mile
Collect backups from all configured serv: Sabhi sanrachit serveron se backup ikattha karein
Unable to connect to the server. The app: Server se jodne mein asamarth. Sanchar ke bina application ka upyog nahin kiya ja sakta.
Phir se koshish kar raha hoon...
Retry Connection: Sanchar Phir Se Karne Ki Koshish Karein
Scan this QR code with your device to re: Is QR code ko aapke device par scan karein taaki aapko is vishay ke liye NTFY suchna prapt ho.
Open your device camera or a QR code sca: Aapke device camera ya QR code scanner app kholein aur is code ko scan karein.
Before scanning install the NTFY app fro: Scan karne se pehle Play Store, App Store ya F-Droid se NTFY app sansthaapit karein
Open {{serverAlias}}({{serverName}}) con: {{serverAlias}} ({{serverName}}) sanrachna kholein (Purani UI ke liye right-click karein)
Open Duplicati configuration (Right-clic: Duplicati sanrachna kholein (Purani UI ke liye right-click karein)
Filter servers by name, alias, or backup: Serveron ko naam, upnaam, ya backup naam dwara filter karein...
